inputs.text: a single bold iconic channel emblem or mascot logo mark, centered medallion, minimal, symmetrical, high contrast, plain dark background. Medium: wide, shadow-theater silhouette cutouts. Texture: paper-like matte finish with faint static patterns resembling radio noise.
